message:
refactor(session): optimize session index snapshot update with borrowed parameters

Change enqueue_session_index_snapshot_update() to accept references (&Path, &SessionHeader)
instead of owned values (PathBuf, SessionHeader), eliminating unnecessary clones at all
3 call sites in Session's streaming and save methods. Improves memory efficiency by
avoiding allocations for data that is only read, not stored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
